PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-24-2018 Continued To Dec-10-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Caroline Hinshaw for Maria Fang
Matthew Matiasevich for James Chen

Ms. Hinshaw stated that the parties agreed to put the matter over to December of 2019 and that they have been talking to obtain consent for Counsel to receive service on behalf of Mr. Chen. Mr. Matiasevich stated his position is there in no need for appointment of Administrator until the Hong Kong proceeding is decided, it makes no difference to his client if the petition is dismissed or continued until 2019, and that the trial in Hong Kong on the issue of who controls the estate is set for July of 2019. The Court expressed concern about the length of the continuance. Ms. Hinshaw stated that she would prefer not to have to start over. The Status Report is Off-Calendar. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to December 10, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 with the expectation the parties file a joint status statement by December 3, 2019. Ms. Hinshaw is to submit a form of order.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-05-2017 Continued To Jan-09-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Caroline Hinshaw for Maria Fang.
Matthew Matiasevich for James Chen.

Ms. Hinshaw requested a continuance stating that Mr. Livingston is ill, that his firm can not continue to represent Ms. Fang and that she just got this. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to January 9, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Ms. Hinshaw that there either needs to be a petition for approval of report on status of administration or this petition will need to go off calendar to await the outcome in Hong Kong.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-14-2017 Continued To Dec-05-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-14-2017 Continued To Nov-14-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-15-2016 Continued To Feb-14-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrew Zabronsky for James Chen.

Mr. Zabronsky reported that they are proceeding in Hong Kong, that they have completed document discovery, that they have almost completed expert discovery, that they will set a trial date early next year and that there is nothing to do here until then. The Petition for Letters of Administration was continued to February 14, 2017 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. The Court requested that counsel file a status report one week prior to the hearing date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Yolanda Mazariegos. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-24-2016 Continued To Nov-15-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-10-2016 Continued To May-24-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-15-2015 Continued To May-10-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrew Zabronsky for James Chen.

The Court asked about the progress in Hong Kong. Mr. Zabronsky reported that they are litigating the will contest, that they just completed mediation which was not successful, that they are still conducting discovery and that the matter should either be continued for another year or dismissed. Mr. Zabronsky stated that they are getting nearer to a resolution in Hong Kong, that they are trying to get expert testimony and that there has been a lot of continuances. The petition for letters of administration was continued to May 10, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-25-2015 Continued To Sep-15-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-26-2014 Continued To Aug-25-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrew Zabronsky for James Chen.

Mr. Zabronsky stated that the Hong Kong probate is proceeding. The Petition for Letters of Administration was continued to August 25, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on the Hong Kong probate.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-27-2013 Continued To Aug-26-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Maria Fang'S Petition For Probate
Off Calendar Aug-30-2013 Granted Per Written Order

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Maria Fang'S Petition For Probate
Off Calendar Jul-11-2013 Continued To Aug-22-13 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-16-2013 Continued To Aug-27-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrew Zabronsky for James Chen. Mary Mix for and with Maria Fang. Ernest Der for Debra Dolch (Conservator).

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to stay of the San Francisco proceeding until the Hong Kong matter is concluded, whether Madamme Wong died intestate or testate, where the assets are located (Hong Kong versus San Francisco), whether there is a blood relation between James Chen and Madamme Wong, whether Maria Fang was adopted by Madamme Wong, having someone in place to locate and collect assets, having a neutral Professional Fiduciary (other than Ms. Dolch ) appointed, etc. The Petition for Letters of Administration was continued to August 27, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 (after the hearing on the Motion to Stay Petition for Probate is heard).

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

EX PARTE PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-01-2013 Denied
